_provenance: schema-derived from compute_vwap_breakdown_update signature (math_engine.py:363-374) and alpha_bot_execution.py:873-886 call site. VWAP inputs are chosen to make underlying conditions True (gate passes, System A fires) — suppression must come from the grace window, not the VWAP gate itself. No producer-computed floats — VWAP diff and HWM are named sentinel values (e.g. 'heavily negative' = -5.0 to ensure gate passes).
description: VWAP-Breakdown and VWAP-Bleed-Cut must be suppressed inside the 15-min grace window even when their underlying conditions are True
note_on_inputs: vwap_ticks=10 and vwap_bleed_ticks=10 both exceed their thresholds — without grace, both breakdown and bleed would fire. current_return < safe_hwm and current_return <= vwap_bleed_arm_pct, so System A and B conditions are met. Grace window must prevent both from firing.
expected_trailing_stop_fires: not suppressed by grace — tested separately
expected_tp_fires: not suppressed by grace — tested separately
